{{/* forge:head emits , <meta description>, Open Graph, and JSON-LD tags derived from the module's Head() method. It is a no-op on list pages unless a HeadFunc option was provided on the module. */}} {{template "forge:head" .Head}} <style> body { font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; max-width: 760px; margin: 2rem auto; padding: 0 1rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #1a1a1a; } header { border-bottom: 2px solid #0070f3; margin-bottom: 2rem; padding-bottom: 1rem; } header h1 a { text-decoration: none; color: inherit; } h2.section { font-size: 0.8rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: #666; margin: 2rem 0 0.5rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #e5e5e5; padding-bottom: 0.25rem; } ul.docs { list-style: none; padding: 0; margin: 0 0 1rem; } ul.docs li { padding: 0.6rem 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f0f0f0; } ul.docs li:last-child { border-bottom: none; } ul.docs li.section-label { font-size: 0.8rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; color: #666; padding: 1.5rem 0 0.25rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #d0d0d0; font-weight: 700; } ul.docs li a { font-weight: 600; color: #0070f3; text-decoration: none; font-size: 1.05rem; } ul.docs li a:hover { text-decoration: underline; } ul.docs li p { margin: 0.25rem 0 0; font-size: 0.9rem; color: #555; } .ai-note { background: #f6f8ff; border: 1px solid #d0d7ff; border-radius: 6px; padding: 0.75rem 1rem; font-size: 0.875rem; margin-top: 2rem; } .ai-note a { color: #0070f3; } footer { border-top: 1px solid #e5e5e5; margin-top: 2rem; padding-top: 1rem; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #666; } footer a { color: #666; } </style> </head> <body> <header> <h1><a href="/docs">Forge Documentation</a></h1> <p>Guides and reference for building with Forge CMS.</p> </header> <main> {{/* Docs are seeded in section order (Guides first, Reference second). The template tracks the current section with a variable and emits a section heading whenever the Section field changes. Each item links to its show page at /docs/{slug}. */}} {{$section := ""}} <ul class="docs"> {{range .Content}} {{if ne .Section $section}} {{$section = .Section}} {{/* Section label row — emitted once per distinct Section value. */}} <li class="section-label">{{.Section}}</li> {{end}} <li> <a href="/docs/{{.Slug}}">{{.Title}}</a> {{/* forge_excerpt trims plain text to N characters. .Body here is raw markdown; forge_excerpt strips formatting first. */}} <p>{{.Body | forge_excerpt 140}}</p> </li> {{end}} </ul> <div class="ai-note"> <strong>AI assistants:</strong> This documentation is available in machine-readable formats: <a href="/llms.txt">llms.txt</a> (compact index) and <a href="/llms-full.txt">llms-full.txt</a> (full markdown corpus). Each page also has an <code>/aidoc</code> endpoint (e.g. <a href="/docs/getting-started/aidoc">/docs/getting-started/aidoc</a>). </div> </main> <footer> <p> <a href="/llms.txt">llms.txt</a> · <a href="/llms-full.txt">llms-full.txt</a> · <a href="/sitemap.xml">Sitemap</a> · <a href="/robots.txt">robots.txt</a> </p> </footer> </body> </html>
